54	public section
55	open Polynomial MvPolynomial Ideal Nat RingHom List
56	
57	variable {k : Type*} [Field k] {n : ℕ} (f : MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k)
58	variable (v w : Fin (n + 1) →₀ ℕ)
59	
60	namespace NoetherNormalization
61	
62	section equivT
63	
64	/-- `up` is defined as `2 + f.totalDegree`. Any big enough number would work. -/
65	local notation3 "up" => 2 + f.totalDegree
66	
67	variable {f v} in
68	private lemma lt_up (vlt : ∀ i, v i < up) : ∀ l ∈ ofFn v, l < up := by
69	  grind
70	
71	/-- `r` maps `(i : Fin (n + 1))` to `up ^ i`. -/
72	local notation3 "r" => fun (i : Fin (n + 1)) ↦ up ^ i.1
73	
74	/-- We construct an algebra map `T1 f c` which maps `X_i` into `X_i + c • X_0 ^ r_i` when `i ≠ 0`
75	and `X_0` to `X_0`. -/
76	noncomputable abbrev T1 (c : k) :
77	    MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k →ₐ[k] MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k :=
78	  aeval fun i ↦ if i = 0 then X 0 else X i + c • X 0 ^ r i
79	
80	private lemma t1_comp_t1_neg (c : k) : (T1 f c).comp (T1 f (-c)) = AlgHom.id _ _ := by
81	  rw [comp_aeval, ← MvPolynomial.aeval_X_left]
82	  ext i v
83	  cases i using Fin.cases <;> simp
84	
85	/- `T1 f 1` leads to an algebra equiv `T f`. -/
86	private noncomputable abbrev T := AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom (T1 f 1) (T1 f (-1))
87	  (t1_comp_t1_neg f 1) (by simpa using t1_comp_t1_neg f (-1))
88	
89	private lemma sum_r_mul_ne (vlt : ∀ i, v i < up) (wlt : ∀ i, w i < up) (ne : v ≠ w) :
90	    ∑ x : Fin (n + 1), r x * v x ≠ ∑ x : Fin (n + 1), r x * w x := by
91	  intro h
92	  refine ne <| Finsupp.ext <| congrFun <| ofFn_inj.mp ?_
93	  apply ofDigits_inj_of_len_eq (Nat.lt_add_right f.totalDegree one_lt_two)
94	    (by simp) (lt_up vlt) (lt_up wlt)
95	  simpa only [ofDigits_eq_sum_mapIdx, mapIdx_eq_ofFn, get_ofFn, length_ofFn,
96	    Fin.val_cast, mul_comm, sum_ofFn] using h
97	
98	private lemma degreeOf_zero_t {a : k} (ha : a ≠ 0) : ((T f) (monomial v a)).degreeOf 0 =
99	    ∑ i : Fin (n + 1), (r i) * v i := by
100	  rw [← natDegree_finSuccEquiv, monomial_eq, Finsupp.prod_pow v fun a ↦ X a]
101	  simp only [Fin.prod_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_succ, map_mul, map_prod, map_pow,
102	    AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom_apply, MvPolynomial.aeval_C, MvPolynomial.aeval_X, if_pos, Fin.succ_ne_zero,
103	    ite_false, one_smul, map_add, finSuccEquiv_X_zero, finSuccEquiv_X_succ, algebraMap_eq]
104	  have h (i : Fin n) :
105	      (Polynomial.C (X (R := k) i) + Polynomial.X ^ r i.succ) ^ v i.succ ≠ 0 :=
106	    pow_ne_zero (v i.succ) (leadingCoeff_ne_zero.mp <| by simp [add_comm, leadingCoeff_X_pow_add_C])
107	  rw [natDegree_mul (by simp [ha]) (mul_ne_zero (by simp) (Finset.prod_ne_zero_iff.mpr
108	    (fun i _ ↦ h i))), natDegree_mul (by simp) (Finset.prod_ne_zero_iff.mpr (fun i _ ↦ h i)),
109	    natDegree_prod _ _ (fun i _ ↦ h i), natDegree_finSuccEquiv, degreeOf_C]
110	  simpa only [natDegree_pow, zero_add, natDegree_X, mul_one, Fin.val_zero, pow_zero, one_mul,
111	    add_right_inj] using Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ ↦ by
112	    rw [add_comm (Polynomial.C _), natDegree_X_pow_add_C, mul_comm])
113	
114	/- `T` maps different monomials of `f` to polynomials with different degrees in `X_0`. -/
115	private lemma degreeOf_t_ne_of_ne (hv : v ∈ f.support) (hw : w ∈ f.support) (ne : v ≠ w) :
116	    (T f <| monomial v <| coeff v f).degreeOf 0 ≠
117	    (T f <| monomial w <| coeff w f).degreeOf 0 := by
118	  rw [degreeOf_zero_t _ _ <| mem_support_iff.mp hv, degreeOf_zero_t _ _ <| mem_support_iff.mp hw]
119	  refine sum_r_mul_ne f v w (fun i ↦ ?_) (fun i ↦ ?_) ne <;>
120	  exact lt_of_le_of_lt ((monomial_le_degreeOf i ‹_›).trans (degreeOf_le_totalDegree f i))
121	    (by lia)
122	
123	private lemma leadingCoeff_finSuccEquiv_t :
124	    (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) ((monomial v) (coeff v f)))).leadingCoeff =
125	    algebraMap k _ (coeff v f) := by
126	  rw [monomial_eq, Finsupp.prod_fintype]
127	  · simp only [map_mul, map_prod, leadingCoeff_mul, leadingCoeff_prod]
128	    rw [AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom_apply, algHom_C, algebraMap_eq, finSuccEquiv_apply,
129	      eval₂Hom_C, coe_comp]
130	    simp only [AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom_apply, Function.comp_apply, leadingCoeff_C, map_pow,
131	      leadingCoeff_pow, algebraMap_eq]
132	    have : ∀ j, ((finSuccEquiv k n) ((T1 f) 1 (X j))).leadingCoeff = 1 := fun j ↦ by
133	      by_cases h : j = 0
134	      · simp [h, finSuccEquiv_apply]
135	      · simp only [aeval_eq_bind₁, bind₁_X_right, if_neg h, one_smul, map_add, map_pow]
136	        obtain ⟨i, rfl⟩ := Fin.exists_succ_eq.mpr h
137	        simp [finSuccEquiv_X_succ, finSuccEquiv_X_zero, add_comm]
138	    simp only [this, one_pow, Finset.prod_const_one, mul_one]
139	  exact fun i ↦ pow_zero _
140	
141	/- `T` maps `f` into some polynomial in `X_0` such that the leading coefficient is invertible. -/
142	private lemma T_leadingcoeff_isUnit (fne : f ≠ 0) :
143	    IsUnit (finSuccEquiv k n (T f f)).leadingCoeff := by
144	  obtain ⟨v, vin, vs⟩ := Finset.exists_max_image f.support
145	    (fun v ↦ (T f ((monomial v) (coeff v f))).degreeOf 0) (support_nonempty.mpr fne)
146	  set h := fun w ↦ (MvPolynomial.monomial w) (coeff w f)
147	  simp only [← natDegree_finSuccEquiv] at vs
148	  replace vs : ∀ x ∈ f.support \ {v}, (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h x))).degree <
149	      (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v))).degree := by
150	    intro x hx
151	    obtain ⟨h1, h2⟩ := Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx
152	    apply degree_lt_degree <| lt_of_le_of_ne (vs x h1) ?_
153	    simpa only [natDegree_finSuccEquiv]
154	      using degreeOf_t_ne_of_ne f _ _ h1 vin <| ne_of_not_mem_cons h2
155	  have coeff : (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v + ∑ x ∈ f.support \ {v}, h x))).leadingCoeff =
156	      (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v))).leadingCoeff := by
157	    simp only [map_add, map_sum]
158	    rw [add_comm]
159	    apply leadingCoeff_add_of_degree_lt <| (lt_of_le_of_lt <| degree_sum_le _ _) ?_
160	    have h2 : h v ≠ 0 := by simpa [h] using mem_support_iff.mp vin
161	    replace h2 : (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v))) ≠ 0 := fun eq ↦ h2 <|
162	      by simpa only [map_eq_zero_iff _ (AlgEquiv.injective _)] using eq
163	    exact (Finset.sup_lt_iff <| Ne.bot_lt (fun x ↦ h2 <| degree_eq_bot.mp x)).mpr vs
164	  nth_rw 2 [← f.support_sum_monomial_coeff]
165	  rw [Finset.sum_eq_add_sum_diff_singleton_of_mem vin h]
166	  rw [leadingCoeff_finSuccEquiv_t] at coeff
167	  simpa only [coeff, algebraMap_eq] using (mem_support_iff.mp vin).isUnit.map MvPolynomial.C
168	
169	end equivT
170	
171	section intmaps
172	
173	variable (I : Ideal (MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k))
174	
175	/- `hom1` is a homomorphism from `k[X_0,...X_{n-1}]` to `k[X_1,...X_n][X]/φ(T(I))`,
176	where `φ` is the isomorphism from `k[X_0,...X_{n-1}]` to `k[X_1,...X_n][X]`. -/
177	private noncomputable abbrev hom1 : MvPolynomial (Fin n) k →ₐ[MvPolynomial (Fin n) k]
178	    (MvPolynomial (Fin n) k)[X] ⧸ (I.map <| T f).map (finSuccEquiv k n) :=
179	  (Quotient.mkₐ (MvPolynomial (Fin n) k) (map (finSuccEquiv k n) (map (T f) I))).comp
180	  (Algebra.ofId (MvPolynomial (Fin n) k) ((MvPolynomial (Fin n) k)[X]))
181	
182	/- `hom1 f I` is integral. -/
183	private lemma hom1_isIntegral (fne : f ≠ 0) (fi : f ∈ I) : (hom1 f I).IsIntegral := by

/-- **L5b — torsion reindex onto fewer variables** (`lem:gf_torsion_reindex`,
Nitsure §4 support-dimension drop). For `A` a noetherian domain, `d ≥ 1`, and `T`
a finite torsion module over `P_d := A[X_1,…,X_d]`, there exist `g ≠ 0` in `A` and
`m' < d` such that, after inverting `g`, the localisation `T_g` is module-finite
over `A_g[X_1,…,X_{m'}]` (one may take `m' = d - 1`). -/
theorem gf_torsion_reindex
input.new_string:
/-- **L5b.1 — annihilator extraction for the torsion module**
(`lem:gf_torsion_annihilator`, Nitsure §4). For `A` a noetherian domain, `d ≥ 0`,
and `T` a finite *torsion* module over `P_d := A[X_1,…,X_d]`, there exists a
non-zero `F ∈ Ann_{P_d}(T)`. Since `P_d` is a domain, a non-zero-divisor
annihilator (provided by `Submodule.annihilator_top_inter_nonZeroDivisors`) is the
same thing as a non-zero one. -/
theorem gf_torsion_annihilator
    (A : Type*) [CommRing A] [IsDomain A] [IsNoetherianRing A] (d : ℕ)
    (T : Type*) [AddCommGroup T] [Module (MvPolynomial (Fin d) A) T]
    [Module.Finite (MvPolynomial (Fin d) A) T]
    (htors : Module.IsTorsion (MvPolynomial (Fin d) A) T) :
    ∃ F : MvPolynomial (Fin d) A, F ≠ 0 ∧
      F ∈ Module.annihilator (MvPolynomial (Fin d) A) T := by
  obtain ⟨F, hFann, hFnzd⟩ := Submodule.annihilator_top_inter_nonZeroDivisors htors
  refine ⟨F, nonZeroDivisors.ne_zero hFnzd, ?_⟩
  rw [← Submodule.annihilator_top]
  exact hFann

/-- Compatibility of `finSuccEquiv` with the constant-variable inclusion
`rename Fin.succ`: the composite `S = R[X_1,…,X_n] → R[X_0,…,X_n] → S[X_0]` is the
coefficient inclusion `Polynomial.C`. Project-local because Mathlib only records the
`optionEquivLeft` variant (`finSuccEquiv_rename_finSuccEquiv`). -/
private theorem finSuccEquiv_rename_succ
    (R : Type*) [CommRing R] (n : ℕ) (s : MvPolynomial (Fin n) R) :
    MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv R n (MvPolynomial.rename Fin.succ s) = Polynomial.C s := by
  induction s using MvPolynomial.induction_on with
  | C r => rw [MvPolynomial.rename_C, MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv_apply, MvPolynomial.eval₂Hom_C]; rfl
  | add p q hp hq => simp [hp, hq]
  | mul_X p i hp =>
    rw [map_mul, map_mul, hp, MvPolynomial.rename_X, MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv_X_succ,
      Polynomial.C_mul]

/-- **L5b.3 — single-variable elimination engine** (shared)
(`lem:gf_mvPolynomial_quotient_finite_monic`, Nitsure §4). Let `R` be a commutative
ring and `p ∈ R[X_0,…,X_n]` a polynomial whose image under `finSuccEquiv` (a
univariate polynomial in `X_0` over `S := R[X_1,…,X_n]`) has a *unit* leading
coefficient — i.e. `p` is monic in `X_0` up to a unit. Then `R[X_0,…,X_n]/(p)` is
module-finite over `S = R[X_1,…,X_n]`, the structure being via the constant
inclusion `S ↪ R[X_0,…,X_n]` (`rename Fin.succ`) followed by `Ideal.Quotient.mk`.

Encoded as `RingHom.Finite` of that composite ring map (which unfolds to
`Module.Finite S (R[X_0,…,X_n]/(p))` with the exotic algebra structure) to avoid an
in-statement `letI` whose `Module` synthesis loops. The proof rescales `finSuccEquiv p`
by the inverse of its unit leading coefficient to a monic polynomial generating the
same ideal, invokes `Polynomial.Monic.finite_quotient`, and transports along the
`S`-algebra isomorphism induced by `finSuccEquiv`. -/
theorem mvPolynomial_quotient_finite_of_monic_lastVar
    (R : Type*) [CommRing R] (n : ℕ)
    (p : MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) R)
    (hp : IsUnit (MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv R n p).leadingCoeff) :
    ((Ideal.Quotient.mk (Ideal.span {p})).comp
        (MvPolynomial.rename Fin.succ).toRingHom :
          MvPolynomial (Fin n) R →+* (MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) R ⧸ Ideal.span {p})).Finite := by
  letI algI : Algebra (MvPolynomial (Fin n) R) (MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) R ⧸ Ideal.span {p}) :=
    ((Ideal.Quotient.mk (Ideal.span {p})).comp
      (MvPolynomial.rename Fin.succ).toRingHom).toAlgebra
  have hc : IsUnit ((hp.unit⁻¹ : (MvPolynomial (Fin n) R)ˣ) : MvPolynomial (Fin n) R) :=
    (hp.unit⁻¹).isUnit
  have hcP :
      IsUnit (Polynomial.C ((hp.unit⁻¹ : (MvPolynomial (Fin n) R)ˣ) : MvPolynomial (Fin n) R)) :=
    hc.map Polynomial.C
  have hmonic : (Polynomial.C ((hp.unit⁻¹ : (MvPolynomial (Fin n) R)ˣ) : MvPolynomial (Fin n) R)
      * MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv R n p).Monic := by
    rw [Polynomial.Monic, Polynomial.leadingCoeff_C_mul_of_isUnit hc]
    exact Units.inv_mul_of_eq hp.unit_spec
  have hspan : Ideal.span {Polynomial.C ((hp.unit⁻¹ : (MvPolynomial (Fin n) R)ˣ) :
        MvPolynomial (Fin n) R) * MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv R n p}
      = Ideal.span {MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv R n p} :=
    Ideal.span_singleton_mul_left_unit hcP (MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv R n p)
  have hfinstd : Module.Finite (MvPolynomial (Fin n) R)
      (Polynomial (MvPolynomial (Fin n) R) ⧸ Ideal.span {MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv R n p}) := by
    rw [← hspan]; exact hmonic.finite_quotient
  have hJ : Ideal.span {MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv R n p}
      = Ideal.map ((MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv R n).toRingEquiv :
          MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) R →+* Polynomial (MvPolynomial (Fin n) R))
        (Ideal.span {p}) := by
    rw [Ideal.map_span, Set.image_singleton]; rfl
  let ψ : (MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) R ⧸ Ideal.span {p})
      ≃+* (Polynomial (MvPolynomial (Fin n) R) ⧸ Ideal.span {MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv R n p}) :=
    Ideal.quotientEquiv (Ideal.span {p}) (Ideal.span {MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv R n p})
      (MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv R n).toRingEquiv hJ
  have hsmul : ∀ s : MvPolynomial (Fin n) R,
      ψ (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin n) R)
          (MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) R ⧸ Ideal.span {p}) s)
      = algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin n) R)
          (Polynomial (MvPolynomial (Fin n) R) ⧸ Ideal.span {MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv R n p}) s := by
    intro s
    change ψ (Ideal.Quotient.mk _ (MvPolynomial.rename Fin.succ s))
      = Ideal.Quotient.mk _ (Polynomial.C s)
    rw [Ideal.quotientEquiv_mk]
    exact congrArg _ (finSuccEquiv_rename_succ R n s)
  let Ψ : (MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) R ⧸ Ideal.span {p})
      ≃ₐ[MvPolynomial (Fin n) R]
      (Polynomial (MvPolynomial (Fin n) R) ⧸ Ideal.span {MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv R n p}) :=
    AlgEquiv.ofRingEquiv hsmul
  exact @Module.Finite.equiv (MvPolynomial (Fin n) R)
    (Polynomial (MvPolynomial (Fin n) R) ⧸ Ideal.span {MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv R n p})
    (MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) R ⧸ Ideal.span {p})
    _ _ _ _ algI.toModule hfinstd Ψ.symm.toLinearEquiv

/-- **L5b — torsion reindex onto fewer variables** (`lem:gf_torsion_reindex`,
Nitsure §4 support-dimension drop). For `A` a noetherian domain, `d ≥ 1`, and `T`
a finite torsion module over `P_d := A[X_1,…,X_d]`, there exist `g ≠ 0` in `A` and
`m' < d` such that, after inverting `g`, the localisation `T_g` is module-finite
over `A_g[X_1,…,X_{m'}]` (one may take `m' = d - 1`). -/
theorem gf_torsion_reindex

import Mathlib
open Polynomial MvPolynomial Ideal Nat RingHom List
namespace NagataDom

variable {k : Type*} [CommRing k] [IsDomain k] {n : ℕ} (f : MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k)
variable (v w : Fin (n + 1) →₀ ℕ)

local notation3 "up" => 2 + f.totalDegree
local notation3 "r" => fun (i : Fin (n + 1)) ↦ up ^ i.1

variable {f v} in
private lemma lt_up (vlt : ∀ i, v i < up) : ∀ l ∈ ofFn v, l < up := by
  grind

noncomputable abbrev T1 (c : k) :
    MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k →ₐ[k] MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k :=
  aeval fun i ↦ if i = 0 then X 0 else X i + c • X 0 ^ r i

private lemma t1_comp_t1_neg (c : k) : (T1 f c).comp (T1 f (-c)) = AlgHom.id _ _ := by
  rw [comp_aeval, ← MvPolynomial.aeval_X_left]
  ext i v
  cases i using Fin.cases <;> simp

private noncomputable abbrev T := AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom (T1 f 1) (T1 f (-1))
  (t1_comp_t1_neg f 1) (by simpa using t1_comp_t1_neg f (-1))

private lemma sum_r_mul_ne (vlt : ∀ i, v i < up) (wlt : ∀ i, w i < up) (ne : v ≠ w) :
    ∑ x : Fin (n + 1), r x * v x ≠ ∑ x : Fin (n + 1), r x * w x := by
  intro h
  refine ne <| Finsupp.ext <| congrFun <| ofFn_inj.mp ?_
  apply ofDigits_inj_of_len_eq (Nat.lt_add_right f.totalDegree one_lt_two)
    (by simp) (lt_up vlt) (lt_up wlt)
  simpa only [ofDigits_eq_sum_mapIdx, mapIdx_eq_ofFn, get_ofFn, length_ofFn,
    Fin.val_cast, mul_comm, sum_ofFn] using h

end NagataDom

import Mathlib
open Polynomial MvPolynomial Ideal Nat RingHom List
namespace NagataDom

variable {k : Type*} [CommRing k] [IsDomain k] {n : ℕ} (f : MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k)
variable (v w : Fin (n + 1) →₀ ℕ)

local notation3 "up" => 2 + f.totalDegree
local notation3 "r" => fun (i : Fin (n + 1)) ↦ up ^ i.1

variable {f v} in
private lemma lt_up (vlt : ∀ i, v i < up) : ∀ l ∈ ofFn v, l < up := by grind

noncomputable abbrev T1 (c : k) :
    MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k →ₐ[k] MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k :=
  aeval fun i ↦ if i = 0 then X 0 else X i + c • X 0 ^ r i

private lemma t1_comp_t1_neg (c : k) : (T1 f c).comp (T1 f (-c)) = AlgHom.id _ _ := by
  rw [comp_aeval, ← MvPolynomial.aeval_X_left]; ext i v; cases i using Fin.cases <;> simp

private noncomputable abbrev T := AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom (T1 f 1) (T1 f (-1))
  (t1_comp_t1_neg f 1) (by simpa using t1_comp_t1_neg f (-1))

private lemma degreeOf_zero_t {a : k} (ha : a ≠ 0) : ((T f) (monomial v a)).degreeOf 0 =
    ∑ i : Fin (n + 1), (r i) * v i := by
  rw [← natDegree_finSuccEquiv, monomial_eq, Finsupp.prod_pow v fun a ↦ X a]
  simp only [Fin.prod_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_succ, map_mul, map_prod, map_pow,
    AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom_apply, MvPolynomial.aeval_C, MvPolynomial.aeval_X, if_pos, Fin.succ_ne_zero,
    ite_false, one_smul, map_add, finSuccEquiv_X_zero, finSuccEquiv_X_succ, algebraMap_eq]
  have h (i : Fin n) :
      (Polynomial.C (X (R := k) i) + Polynomial.X ^ r i.succ) ^ v i.succ ≠ 0 :=
    pow_ne_zero (v i.succ) (leadingCoeff_ne_zero.mp <| by simp [add_comm, leadingCoeff_X_pow_add_C])
  rw [natDegree_mul (by simp [ha]) (mul_ne_zero (by simp) (Finset.prod_ne_zero_iff.mpr
    (fun i _ ↦ h i))), natDegree_mul (by simp) (Finset.prod_ne_zero_iff.mpr (fun i _ ↦ h i)),
    natDegree_prod _ _ (fun i _ ↦ h i), natDegree_finSuccEquiv, degreeOf_C]
  simpa only [natDegree_pow, zero_add, natDegree_X, mul_one, Fin.val_zero, pow_zero, one_mul,
    add_right_inj] using Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ ↦ by
    rw [add_comm (Polynomial.C _), natDegree_X_pow_add_C, mul_comm])

private lemma degreeOf_t_ne_of_ne (hv : v ∈ f.support) (hw : w ∈ f.support) (ne : v ≠ w) :
    (T f <| monomial v <| coeff v f).degreeOf 0 ≠
    (T f <| monomial w <| coeff w f).degreeOf 0 := by
  rw [degreeOf_zero_t _ _ <| mem_support_iff.mp hv, degreeOf_zero_t _ _ <| mem_support_iff.mp hw]
  refine sum_r_mul_ne f v w (fun i ↦ ?_) (fun i ↦ ?_) ne <;>
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt ((monomial_le_degreeOf i ‹_›).trans (degreeOf_le_totalDegree f i))
    (by lia)

private lemma leadingCoeff_finSuccEquiv_t :
    (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) ((monomial v) (coeff v f)))).leadingCoeff =
    algebraMap k _ (coeff v f) := by
  rw [monomial_eq, Finsupp.prod_fintype]
  · simp only [map_mul, map_prod, leadingCoeff_mul, leadingCoeff_prod]
    rw [AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom_apply, algHom_C, algebraMap_eq, finSuccEquiv_apply,
      eval₂Hom_C, coe_comp]
    simp only [AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom_apply, Function.comp_apply, leadingCoeff_C, map_pow,
      leadingCoeff_pow, algebraMap_eq]
    have : ∀ j, ((finSuccEquiv k n) ((T1 f) 1 (X j))).leadingCoeff = 1 := fun j ↦ by
      by_cases h : j = 0
      · simp [h, finSuccEquiv_apply]
      · simp only [aeval_eq_bind₁, bind₁_X_right, if_neg h, one_smul, map_add, map_pow]
        obtain ⟨i, rfl⟩ := Fin.exists_succ_eq.mpr h
        simp [finSuccEquiv_X_succ, finSuccEquiv_X_zero, add_comm]
    simp only [this, one_pow, Finset.prod_const_one, mul_one]
  exact fun i ↦ pow_zero _

end NagataDom

import Mathlib
open Polynomial MvPolynomial Ideal Nat RingHom List
namespace NagataDom

variable {k : Type*} [CommRing k] [IsDomain k] {n : ℕ} (f : MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k)
variable (v w : Fin (n + 1) →₀ ℕ)
local notation3 "up" => 2 + f.totalDegree
local notation3 "r" => fun (i : Fin (n + 1)) ↦ up ^ i.1
variable {f v} in
private lemma lt_up (vlt : ∀ i, v i < up) : ∀ l ∈ ofFn v, l < up := by grind
noncomputable abbrev T1 (c : k) :
    MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k →ₐ[k] MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k :=
  aeval fun i ↦ if i = 0 then X 0 else X i + c • X 0 ^ r i
private lemma t1_comp_t1_neg (c : k) : (T1 f c).comp (T1 f (-c)) = AlgHom.id _ _ := by
  rw [comp_aeval, ← MvPolynomial.aeval_X_left]; ext i v; cases i using Fin.cases <;> simp
private noncomputable abbrev T := AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom (T1 f 1) (T1 f (-1))
  (t1_comp_t1_neg f 1) (by simpa using t1_comp_t1_neg f (-1))
private lemma sum_r_mul_ne (vlt : ∀ i, v i < up) (wlt : ∀ i, w i < up) (ne : v ≠ w) :
    ∑ x : Fin (n + 1), r x * v x ≠ ∑ x : Fin (n + 1), r x * w x := by
  intro h
  refine ne <| Finsupp.ext <| congrFun <| ofFn_inj.mp ?_
  apply ofDigits_inj_of_len_eq (Nat.lt_add_right f.totalDegree one_lt_two)
    (by simp) (lt_up vlt) (lt_up wlt)
  simpa only [ofDigits_eq_sum_mapIdx, mapIdx_eq_ofFn, get_ofFn, length_ofFn,
    Fin.val_cast, mul_comm, sum_ofFn] using h
private lemma degreeOf_zero_t {a : k} (ha : a ≠ 0) : ((T f) (monomial v a)).degreeOf 0 =
    ∑ i : Fin (n + 1), (r i) * v i := by
  rw [← natDegree_finSuccEquiv, monomial_eq, Finsupp.prod_pow v fun a ↦ X a]
  simp only [Fin.prod_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_succ, map_mul, map_prod, map_pow,
    AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom_apply, MvPolynomial.aeval_C, MvPolynomial.aeval_X, if_pos, Fin.succ_ne_zero,
    ite_false, one_smul, map_add, finSuccEquiv_X_zero, finSuccEquiv_X_succ, algebraMap_eq]
  have h (i : Fin n) :
      (Polynomial.C (X (R := k) i) + Polynomial.X ^ r i.succ) ^ v i.succ ≠ 0 :=
    pow_ne_zero (v i.succ) (leadingCoeff_ne_zero.mp <| by simp [add_comm, leadingCoeff_X_pow_add_C])
  rw [natDegree_mul (by simp [ha]) (mul_ne_zero (by simp) (Finset.prod_ne_zero_iff.mpr
    (fun i _ ↦ h i))), natDegree_mul (by simp) (Finset.prod_ne_zero_iff.mpr (fun i _ ↦ h i)),
    natDegree_prod _ _ (fun i _ ↦ h i), natDegree_finSuccEquiv, degreeOf_C]
  simpa only [natDegree_pow, zero_add, natDegree_X, mul_one, Fin.val_zero, pow_zero, one_mul,
    add_right_inj] using Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ ↦ by
    rw [add_comm (Polynomial.C _), natDegree_X_pow_add_C, mul_comm])
private lemma degreeOf_t_ne_of_ne (hv : v ∈ f.support) (hw : w ∈ f.support) (ne : v ≠ w) :
    (T f <| monomial v <| coeff v f).degreeOf 0 ≠
    (T f <| monomial w <| coeff w f).degreeOf 0 := by
  rw [degreeOf_zero_t _ _ <| mem_support_iff.mp hv, degreeOf_zero_t _ _ <| mem_support_iff.mp hw]
  refine sum_r_mul_ne f v w (fun i ↦ ?_) (fun i ↦ ?_) ne <;>
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt ((monomial_le_degreeOf i ‹_›).trans (degreeOf_le_totalDegree f i)) (by lia)
private lemma leadingCoeff_finSuccEquiv_t :
    (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) ((monomial v) (coeff v f)))).leadingCoeff =
    algebraMap k _ (coeff v f) := by
  rw [monomial_eq, Finsupp.prod_fintype]
  · simp only [map_mul, map_prod, leadingCoeff_mul, leadingCoeff_prod]
    rw [AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom_apply, algHom_C, algebraMap_eq, finSuccEquiv_apply, eval₂Hom_C, coe_comp]
    simp only [AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom_apply, Function.comp_apply, leadingCoeff_C, map_pow,
      leadingCoeff_pow, algebraMap_eq]
    have : ∀ j, ((finSuccEquiv k n) ((T1 f) 1 (X j))).leadingCoeff = 1 := fun j ↦ by
      by_cases h : j = 0
      · simp [h, finSuccEquiv_apply]
      · simp only [aeval_eq_bind₁, bind₁_X_right, if_neg h, one_smul, map_add, map_pow]
        obtain ⟨i, rfl⟩ := Fin.exists_succ_eq.mpr h
        simp [finSuccEquiv_X_succ, finSuccEquiv_X_zero, add_comm]
    simp only [this, one_pow, Finset.prod_const_one, mul_one]
  exact fun i ↦ pow_zero _

private lemma T_leadingcoeff_eq (fne : f ≠ 0) :
    ∃ v ∈ f.support,
      (finSuccEquiv k n (T f f)).leadingCoeff = MvPolynomial.C (coeff v f) := by
  obtain ⟨v, vin, vs⟩ := Finset.exists_max_image f.support
    (fun v ↦ (T f ((monomial v) (coeff v f))).degreeOf 0) (support_nonempty.mpr fne)
  set h := fun w ↦ (MvPolynomial.monomial w) (coeff w f)
  simp only [← natDegree_finSuccEquiv] at vs
  replace vs : ∀ x ∈ f.support \ {v}, (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h x))).degree <
      (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v))).degree := by
    intro x hx
    obtain ⟨h1, h2⟩ := Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx
    apply degree_lt_degree <| lt_of_le_of_ne (vs x h1) ?_
    simpa only [natDegree_finSuccEquiv]
      using degreeOf_t_ne_of_ne f _ _ h1 vin <| ne_of_not_mem_cons h2
  have coeff : (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v + ∑ x ∈ f.support \ {v}, h x))).leadingCoeff =
      (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v))).leadingCoeff := by
    simp only [map_add, map_sum]
    rw [add_comm]
    apply leadingCoeff_add_of_degree_lt <| (lt_of_le_of_lt <| degree_sum_le _ _) ?_
    have h2 : h v ≠ 0 := by simpa [h] using mem_support_iff.mp vin
    replace h2 : (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v))) ≠ 0 := fun eq ↦ h2 <|
      by simpa only [map_eq_zero_iff _ (AlgEquiv.injective _)] using eq
    exact (Finset.sup_lt_iff <| Ne.bot_lt (fun x ↦ h2 <| degree_eq_bot.mp x)).mpr vs
  refine ⟨v, vin, ?_⟩
  rw [leadingCoeff_finSuccEquiv_t] at coeff
  nth_rw 1 [← f.support_sum_monomial_coeff]
  rw [Finset.sum_eq_add_sum_diff_singleton_of_mem vin h]
  rw [coeff, algebraMap_eq]

end NagataDom

variable (v w : Fin (n + 1) →₀ ℕ)
local notation3 "up" => 2 + f.totalDegree
local notation3 "r" => fun (i : Fin (n + 1)) ↦ up ^ i.1
variable {f v} in
private lemma lt_up (vlt : ∀ i, v i < up) : ∀ l ∈ ofFn v, l < up := by grind
noncomputable abbrev T1 (c : k) :
    MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k →ₐ[k] MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k :=

private lemma t1_comp_t1_neg (c : k) : (T1 f c).comp (T1 f (-c)) = AlgHom.id _ _ := by
  rw [comp_aeval, ← MvPolynomial.aeval_X_left]; ext i v; cases i using Fin.cases <;> simp
private noncomputable abbrev T := AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom (T1 f 1) (T1 f (-1))
  (t1_comp_t1_neg f 1) (by simpa using t1_comp_t1_neg f (-1))
private lemma sum_r_mul_ne (vlt : ∀ i, v i < up) (wlt : ∀ i, w i < up) (ne : v ≠ w) :
    ∑ x : Fin (n + 1), r x * v x ≠ ∑ x : Fin (n + 1), r x * w x := by
  intro h
  refine ne <| Finsupp.ext <| congrFun <| ofFn_inj.mp ?_
  apply ofDigits_inj_of_len_eq (Nat.lt_add_right f.totalDegree one_lt_two)
    (by simp) (lt_up vlt) (lt_up wlt)
  simpa only [ofDigits_eq_sum_mapIdx, mapIdx_eq_ofFn, get_ofFn, length_ofFn,
    Fin.val_cast, mul_comm, sum_ofFn] using h
private lemma degreeOf_zero_t {a : k} (ha : a ≠ 0) : ((T f) (monomial v a)).degreeOf 0 =
    ∑ i : Fin (n + 1), (r i) * v i := by
  rw [← natDegree_finSuccEquiv, monomial_eq, Finsupp.prod_pow v fun a ↦ X a]
  simp only [Fin.prod_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_succ, map_mul, map_prod, map_pow,
    AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom_apply, MvPolynomial.aeval_C, MvPolynomial.aeval_X, if_pos, Fin.succ_ne_zero,
    ite_false, one_smul, map_add, finSuccEquiv_X_zero, finSuccEquiv_X_succ, algebraMap_eq]
  have h (i : Fin n) :
      (Polynomial.C (X (R := k) i) + Polynomial.X ^ r i.succ) ^ v i.succ ≠ 0 :=
    pow_ne_zero (v i.succ) (leadingCoeff_ne_zero.mp <| by simp [add_comm, leadingCoeff_X_pow_add_C])
  rw [natDegree_mul (by simp [ha]) (mul_ne_zero (by simp) (Finset.prod_ne_zero_iff.mpr
    (fun i _ ↦ h i))), natDegree_mul (by simp) (Finset.prod_ne_zero_iff.mpr (fun i _ ↦ h i)),
    natDegree_prod _ _ (fun i _ ↦ h i), natDegree_finSuccEquiv, degreeOf_C]
  simpa only [natDegree_pow, zero_add, natDegree_X, mul_one, Fin.val_zero, pow_zero, one_mul,
    add_right_inj] using Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ ↦ by
    rw [add_comm (Polynomial.C _), natDegree_X_pow_add_C, mul_comm])
private lemma degreeOf_t_ne_of_ne (hv : v ∈ f.support) (hw : w ∈ f.support) (ne : v ≠ w) :
    (T f <| monomial v <| coeff v f).degreeOf 0 ≠
    (T f <| monomial w <| coeff w f).degreeOf 0 := by
  rw [degreeOf_zero_t _ _ <| mem_support_iff.mp hv, degreeOf_zero_t _ _ <| mem_support_iff.mp hw]
  refine sum_r_mul_ne f v w (fun i ↦ ?_) (fun i ↦ ?_) ne <;>
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt ((monomial_le_degreeOf i ‹_›).trans (degreeOf_le_totalDegree f i)) (by lia)
private lemma leadingCoeff_finSuccEquiv_t :

    simp only [AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom_apply, Function.comp_apply, leadingCoeff_C, map_pow,

        obtain ⟨i, rfl⟩ := Fin.exists_succ_eq.mpr h

    simp only [this, one_pow, Finset.prod_const_one, mul_one]
  exact fun i ↦ pow_zero _
private lemma T_leadingcoeff_eq (fne : f ≠ 0) :
    ∃ v ∈ f.support,
      (finSuccEquiv k n (T f f)).leadingCoeff = MvPolynomial.C (coeff v f) := by
  obtain ⟨v, vin, vs⟩ := Finset.exists_max_image f.support

  set h := fun w ↦ (MvPolynomial.monomial w) (coeff w f)

      (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v))).degree := by
    intro x hx
    obtain ⟨h1, h2⟩ := Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx
    apply degree_lt_degree <| lt_of_le_of_ne (vs x h1) ?_
    simpa only [natDegree_finSuccEquiv]
      using degreeOf_t_ne_of_ne f _ _ h1 vin <| ne_of_not_mem_cons h2
  have coeff : (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v + ∑ x ∈ f.support \ {v}, h x))).leadingCoeff =
      (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v))).leadingCoeff := by
    simp only [map_add, map_sum]
    rw [add_comm]

    have h2 : h v ≠ 0 := by simpa [h] using mem_support_iff.mp vin
    replace h2 : (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v))) ≠ 0 := fun eq ↦ h2 <|
      by simpa only [map_eq_zero_iff _ (AlgEquiv.injective _)] using eq
    exact (Finset.sup_lt_iff <| Ne.bot_lt (fun x ↦ h2 <| degree_eq_bot.mp x)).mpr vs
  refine ⟨v, vin, ?_⟩
  rw [leadingCoeff_finSuccEquiv_t] at coeff

import Mathlib
open Polynomial MvPolynomial
-- commutation lemma
example (A B : Type) [CommRing A] [CommRing B] (φ : A →+* B) (n : ℕ)
    (q : MvPolynomial (Fin (n+1)) A) :
    finSuccEquiv B n (MvPolynomial.map φ q)
      = Polynomial.map (MvPolynomial.map φ) (finSuccEquiv A n q) := by
  induction q using MvPolynomial.induction_on with
  | C a => simp [finSuccEquiv_apply]
  | add p q hp hq => simp [hp, hq]
  | mul_X p i hp =>
    rw [map_mul, map_mul, map_mul, map_mul, hp, Polynomial.map_mul]
    congr 1
    cases i using Fin.cases with
    | zero => simp [finSuccEquiv_X_zero]
    | succ j => simp [finSuccEquiv_X_succ]

    finSuccEquiv B n (MvPolynomial.map φ q)
      = Polynomial.map (MvPolynomial.map φ) (finSuccEquiv A n q) := by
  induction q using MvPolynomial.induction_on with
  | C a => simp [finSuccEquiv_apply]

import Mathlib
open Polynomial MvPolynomial Ideal Nat RingHom List
namespace NagataDom
variable {k : Type*} [CommRing k] [IsDomain k] {n : ℕ} (f : MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k)
variable (v w : Fin (n + 1) →₀ ℕ)
local notation3 "up" => 2 + f.totalDegree
local notation3 "r" => fun (i : Fin (n + 1)) ↦ up ^ i.1
variable {f v} in
private lemma lt_up (vlt : ∀ i, v i < up) : ∀ l ∈ ofFn v, l < up := by grind
noncomputable abbrev T1 (c : k) :
    MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k →ₐ[k] MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k :=
  aeval fun i ↦ if i = 0 then X 0 else X i + c • X 0 ^ r i
private lemma t1_comp_t1_neg (c : k) : (T1 f c).comp (T1 f (-c)) = AlgHom.id _ _ := by
  rw [comp_aeval, ← MvPolynomial.aeval_X_left]; ext i v; cases i using Fin.cases <;> simp
private noncomputable abbrev T := AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom (T1 f 1) (T1 f (-1))
  (t1_comp_t1_neg f 1) (by simpa using t1_comp_t1_neg f (-1))
private lemma sum_r_mul_ne (vlt : ∀ i, v i < up) (wlt : ∀ i, w i < up) (ne : v ≠ w) :
    ∑ x : Fin (n + 1), r x * v x ≠ ∑ x : Fin (n + 1), r x * w x := by
  intro h
  refine ne <| Finsupp.ext <| congrFun <| ofFn_inj.mp ?_
  apply ofDigits_inj_of_len_eq (Nat.lt_add_right f.totalDegree one_lt_two)
    (by simp) (lt_up vlt) (lt_up wlt)
  simpa only [ofDigits_eq_sum_mapIdx, mapIdx_eq_ofFn, get_ofFn, length_ofFn,
    Fin.val_cast, mul_comm, sum_ofFn] using h
private lemma degreeOf_zero_t {a : k} (ha : a ≠ 0) : ((T f) (monomial v a)).degreeOf 0 =
    ∑ i : Fin (n + 1), (r i) * v i := by
  rw [← natDegree_finSuccEquiv, monomial_eq, Finsupp.prod_pow v fun a ↦ X a]
  simp only [Fin.prod_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_succ, map_mul, map_prod, map_pow,
    AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom_apply, MvPolynomial.aeval_C, MvPolynomial.aeval_X, if_pos, Fin.succ_ne_zero,
    ite_false, one_smul, map_add, finSuccEquiv_X_zero, finSuccEquiv_X_succ, algebraMap_eq]
  have h (i : Fin n) :
      (Polynomial.C (X (R := k) i) + Polynomial.X ^ r i.succ) ^ v i.succ ≠ 0 :=
    pow_ne_zero (v i.succ) (leadingCoeff_ne_zero.mp <| by simp [add_comm, leadingCoeff_X_pow_add_C])
  rw [natDegree_mul (by simp [ha]) (mul_ne_zero (by simp) (Finset.prod_ne_zero_iff.mpr
    (fun i _ ↦ h i))), natDegree_mul (by simp) (Finset.prod_ne_zero_iff.mpr (fun i _ ↦ h i)),
    natDegree_prod _ _ (fun i _ ↦ h i), natDegree_finSuccEquiv, degreeOf_C]
  simpa only [natDegree_pow, zero_add, natDegree_X, mul_one, Fin.val_zero, pow_zero, one_mul,
    add_right_inj] using Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ ↦ by
    rw [add_comm (Polynomial.C _), natDegree_X_pow_add_C, mul_comm])
private lemma degreeOf_t_ne_of_ne (hv : v ∈ f.support) (hw : w ∈ f.support) (ne : v ≠ w) :
    (T f <| monomial v <| coeff v f).degreeOf 0 ≠
    (T f <| monomial w <| coeff w f).degreeOf 0 := by
  rw [degreeOf_zero_t _ _ <| mem_support_iff.mp hv, degreeOf_zero_t _ _ <| mem_support_iff.mp hw]
  refine sum_r_mul_ne f v w (fun i ↦ ?_) (fun i ↦ ?_) ne <;>
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt ((monomial_le_degreeOf i ‹_›).trans (degreeOf_le_totalDegree f i)) (by lia)
private lemma leadingCoeff_finSuccEquiv_t :
    (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) ((monomial v) (coeff v f)))).leadingCoeff =
    algebraMap k _ (coeff v f) := by
  rw [monomial_eq, Finsupp.prod_fintype]
  · simp only [map_mul, map_prod, leadingCoeff_mul, leadingCoeff_prod]
    rw [AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom_apply, algHom_C, algebraMap_eq, finSuccEquiv_apply, eval₂Hom_C, coe_comp]
    simp only [AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom_apply, Function.comp_apply, leadingCoeff_C, map_pow,
      leadingCoeff_pow, algebraMap_eq]
    have : ∀ j, ((finSuccEquiv k n) ((T1 f) 1 (X j))).leadingCoeff = 1 := fun j ↦ by
      by_cases h : j = 0
      · simp [h, finSuccEquiv_apply]
      · simp only [aeval_eq_bind₁, bind₁_X_right, if_neg h, one_smul, map_add, map_pow]
        obtain ⟨i, rfl⟩ := Fin.exists_succ_eq.mpr h
        simp [finSuccEquiv_X_succ, finSuccEquiv_X_zero, add_comm]
    simp only [this, one_pow, Finset.prod_const_one, mul_one]
  exact fun i ↦ pow_zero _
private lemma T_leadingcoeff_eq (fne : f ≠ 0) :
    ∃ v ∈ f.support,
      (finSuccEquiv k n (T f f)).leadingCoeff = MvPolynomial.C (coeff v f) := by
  obtain ⟨v, vin, vs⟩ := Finset.exists_max_image f.support
    (fun v ↦ (T f ((monomial v) (coeff v f))).degreeOf 0) (support_nonempty.mpr fne)
  set h := fun w ↦ (MvPolynomial.monomial w) (coeff w f)
  simp only [← natDegree_finSuccEquiv] at vs
  replace vs : ∀ x ∈ f.support \ {v}, (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h x))).degree <
      (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v))).degree := by
    intro x hx
    obtain ⟨h1, h2⟩ := Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx
    apply degree_lt_degree <| lt_of_le_of_ne (vs x h1) ?_
    simpa only [natDegree_finSuccEquiv]
      using degreeOf_t_ne_of_ne f _ _ h1 vin <| ne_of_not_mem_cons h2
  have coeff : (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v + ∑ x ∈ f.support \ {v}, h x))).leadingCoeff =
      (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v))).leadingCoeff := by
    simp only [map_add, map_sum]
    rw [add_comm]
    apply leadingCoeff_add_of_degree_lt <| (lt_of_le_of_lt <| degree_sum_le _ _) ?_
    have h2 : h v ≠ 0 := by simpa [h] using mem_support_iff.mp vin
    replace h2 : (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v))) ≠ 0 := fun eq ↦ h2 <|
      by simpa only [map_eq_zero_iff _ (AlgEquiv.injective _)] using eq
    exact (Finset.sup_lt_iff <| Ne.bot_lt (fun x ↦ h2 <| degree_eq_bot.mp x)).mpr vs
  refine ⟨v, vin, ?_⟩
  rw [leadingCoeff_finSuccEquiv_t] at coeff
  nth_rw 2 [← f.support_sum_monomial_coeff]
  rw [Finset.sum_eq_add_sum_diff_singleton_of_mem vin h, coeff, algebraMap_eq]

private theorem finSuccEquiv_map_comm {A B : Type*} [CommRing A] [CommRing B]
    (φ : A →+* B) (m : ℕ) (q : MvPolynomial (Fin (m + 1)) A) :
    finSuccEquiv B m (MvPolynomial.map φ q)
      = Polynomial.map (MvPolynomial.map φ) (finSuccEquiv A m q) := by
  induction q using MvPolynomial.induction_on with
  | C a => simp [finSuccEquiv_apply]
  | add p q hp hq => simp [hp, hq]
  | mul_X p i hp =>
    simp only [map_mul, Polynomial.map_mul, hp]
    congr 1
    cases i using Fin.cases with
    | zero => simp [finSuccEquiv_X_zero]
    | succ j => simp [finSuccEquiv_X_succ]

theorem gf_nagata_monic_lastVar
    (A : Type*) [CommRing A] [IsDomain A] (m : ℕ)
    (F : MvPolynomial (Fin (m + 1)) A) (hF : F ≠ 0) :
    ∃ (g : A) (_ : g ≠ 0)
      (e : MvPolynomial (Fin (m + 1)) A ≃ₐ[A] MvPolynomial (Fin (m + 1)) A),
      IsUnit
        (MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv (Localization.Away g) m
          (MvPolynomial.map (algebraMap A (Localization.Away g)) (e F))).leadingCoeff := by
  obtain ⟨v, vin, hlc⟩ := T_leadingcoeff_eq F hF
  refine ⟨coeff v F, mem_support_iff.mp vin, T F, ?_⟩
  set g := coeff v F with hg
  have hgunit : IsUnit (algebraMap A (Localization.Away g) g) :=
    IsLocalization.Away.algebraMap_isUnit g
  have hCunit : IsUnit (MvPolynomial.C (algebraMap A (Localization.Away g) g)
      : MvPolynomial (Fin m) (Localization.Away g)) := hgunit.map MvPolynomial.C
  have hne : (MvPolynomial.map (algebraMap A (Localization.Away g)))
      (finSuccEquiv A m (T F F)).leadingCoeff ≠ 0 := by
    rw [hlc, MvPolynomial.map_C]; exact hCunit.ne_zero
  rw [finSuccEquiv_map_comm, leadingCoeff_map_of_leadingCoeff_ne_zero _ hne, hlc,
    MvPolynomial.map_C]
  exact hCunit

end NagataDom

import Mathlib
open Polynomial MvPolynomial
-- Nontrivial of Localization.Away for nonzero g in domain
example (A : Type) [CommRing A] [IsDomain A] (g : A) (hg : g ≠ 0) :
    Nontrivial (Localization.Away g) := by
  have hle : Submonoid.powers g ≤ nonZeroDivisors A := by
    rw [Submonoid.powers_le]; exact mem_nonZeroDivisors_of_ne_zero hg
  exact (IsLocalization.injective (Localization.Away g) hle).nontrivial

    replace h2 : (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v))) ≠ 0 := fun eq ↦ h2 <|
      by simpa only [map_eq_zero_iff _ (AlgEquiv.injective _)] using eq
    exact (Finset.sup_lt_iff <| Ne.bot_lt (fun x ↦ h2 <| degree_eq_bot.mp x)).mpr vs
  refine ⟨v, vin, ?_⟩
  rw [leadingCoeff_finSuccEquiv_t] at coeff
  nth_rw 2 [← f.support_sum_monomial_coeff]
  rw [Finset.sum_eq_add_sum_diff_singleton_of_mem vin h, coeff, algebraMap_eq]

theorem gf_nagata_monic_lastVar
    (A : Type*) [CommRing A] [IsDomain A] (m : ℕ)
    (F : MvPolynomial (Fin (m + 1)) A) (hF : F ≠ 0) :
    ∃ (g : A) (_ : g ≠ 0)
      (e : MvPolynomial (Fin (m + 1)) A ≃ₐ[A] MvPolynomial (Fin (m + 1)) A),
      IsUnit
        (MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv (Localization.Away g) m
          (MvPolynomial.map (algebraMap A (Localization.Away g)) (e F))).leadingCoeff := by
  obtain ⟨v, vin, hlc⟩ := T_leadingcoeff_eq F hF
  have hg0 : coeff v F ≠ 0 := mem_support_iff.mp vin
  refine ⟨coeff v F, hg0, T F, ?_⟩
  set g := coeff v F with hg
  haveI : Nontrivial (Localization.Away g) := by
    have hle : Submonoid.powers g ≤ nonZeroDivisors A := by
      rw [Submonoid.powers_le]; exact mem_nonZeroDivisors_of_ne_zero hg0
    exact (IsLocalization.injective (Localization.Away g) hle).nontrivial
  have hgunit : IsUnit (algebraMap A (Localization.Away g) g) :=
    IsLocalization.Away.algebraMap_isUnit g
  have hCunit : IsUnit (MvPolynomial.C (algebraMap A (Localization.Away g) g)
      : MvPolynomial (Fin m) (Localization.Away g)) := hgunit.map MvPolynomial.C
  have hne : (MvPolynomial.map (algebraMap A (Localization.Away g)))
      (finSuccEquiv A m (T F F)).leadingCoeff ≠ 0 := by
    rw [hlc, MvPolynomial.map_C]; exact hCunit.ne_zero
  rw [finSuccEquiv_map_comm, leadingCoeff_map_of_leadingCoeff_ne_zero _ hne, hlc,
    MvPolynomial.map_C]
  exact hCunit

end NagataDom

/-! ### L5b.2 — Nagata change of variables (`lem:gf_nagata_monic_lastVar`)

The single-variable elimination of the support-dimension drop needs a triangular
change of variables `e` making a non-zero `F ∈ A[X_0,…,X_n]` monic in `X_0` up to a
unit after inverting one `g ∈ A`. Mathlib's Noether-normalisation development
(`Mathlib.RingTheory.NoetherNormalization`) constructs exactly this transformation
`T` and proves the leading coefficient is a unit — but only over a *field*, and as
`private` lemmas. The block below replays that construction over a noetherian *domain*
(the field is used in Mathlib only to conclude the top coefficient is a unit; over a
domain it is merely non-zero, and becomes a unit after inverting it). The degree
bookkeeping (`degreeOf_zero_t`, `leadingCoeff_finSuccEquiv_t`, `T_leadingcoeff_eq`) is
a domain-adapted transcription of the Mathlib originals. -/

section NagataNormalization

open Polynomial MvPolynomial Ideal Nat RingHom List

/-- `finSuccEquiv` commutes with coefficient base change `MvPolynomial.map phi`. -/
private theorem finSuccEquiv_map_comm {A B : Type*} [CommRing A] [CommRing B]
    (phi : A →+* B) (m : ℕ) (q : MvPolynomial (Fin (m + 1)) A) :
    finSuccEquiv B m (MvPolynomial.map phi q)
      = Polynomial.map (MvPolynomial.map phi) (finSuccEquiv A m q) := by
  induction q using MvPolynomial.induction_on with
  | C a => simp [finSuccEquiv_apply]
  | add p q hp hq => simp [hp, hq]
  | mul_X p i hp =>
    simp only [map_mul, Polynomial.map_mul, hp]
    congr 1
    cases i using Fin.cases with
    | zero => simp [finSuccEquiv_X_zero]
    | succ j => simp [finSuccEquiv_X_succ]

variable {k : Type*} [CommRing k] [IsDomain k] {n : ℕ} (f : MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k)
variable (v w : Fin (n + 1) →₀ ℕ)

local notation3 "up" => 2 + f.totalDegree
local notation3 "r" => fun (i : Fin (n + 1)) ↦ up ^ i.1

variable {f v} in
private lemma lt_up (vlt : ∀ i, v i < up) : ∀ l ∈ ofFn v, l < up := by grind

/-- The triangular Nagata substitution `X_i ↦ X_i + c • X_0 ^ (up ^ i)` (`i ≠ 0`),
`X_0 ↦ X_0`. Transcribed from `Mathlib.RingTheory.NoetherNormalization` to a domain. -/
noncomputable abbrev T1 (c : k) :
    MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k →ₐ[k] MvPolynomial (Fin (n + 1)) k :=
  aeval fun i ↦ if i = 0 then X 0 else X i + c • X 0 ^ r i

private lemma t1_comp_t1_neg (c : k) : (T1 f c).comp (T1 f (-c)) = AlgHom.id _ _ := by
  rw [comp_aeval, ← MvPolynomial.aeval_X_left]; ext i v; cases i using Fin.cases <;> simp

/-- The Nagata transformation as an `A`-algebra automorphism. -/
private noncomputable abbrev T := AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom (T1 f 1) (T1 f (-1))
  (t1_comp_t1_neg f 1) (by simpa using t1_comp_t1_neg f (-1))

private lemma sum_r_mul_ne (vlt : ∀ i, v i < up) (wlt : ∀ i, w i < up) (ne : v ≠ w) :
    ∑ x : Fin (n + 1), r x * v x ≠ ∑ x : Fin (n + 1), r x * w x := by
  intro h
  refine ne <| Finsupp.ext <| congrFun <| ofFn_inj.mp ?_
  apply ofDigits_inj_of_len_eq (Nat.lt_add_right f.totalDegree one_lt_two)
    (by simp) (lt_up vlt) (lt_up wlt)
  simpa only [ofDigits_eq_sum_mapIdx, mapIdx_eq_ofFn, get_ofFn, length_ofFn,
    Fin.val_cast, mul_comm, sum_ofFn] using h

private lemma degreeOf_zero_t {a : k} (ha : a ≠ 0) : ((T f) (monomial v a)).degreeOf 0 =
    ∑ i : Fin (n + 1), (r i) * v i := by
  rw [← natDegree_finSuccEquiv, monomial_eq, Finsupp.prod_pow v fun a ↦ X a]
  simp only [Fin.prod_univ_succ, Fin.sum_univ_succ, map_mul, map_prod, map_pow,
    AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom_apply, MvPolynomial.aeval_C, MvPolynomial.aeval_X, if_pos, Fin.succ_ne_zero,
    ite_false, one_smul, map_add, finSuccEquiv_X_zero, finSuccEquiv_X_succ, algebraMap_eq]
  have h (i : Fin n) :
      (Polynomial.C (X (R := k) i) + Polynomial.X ^ r i.succ) ^ v i.succ ≠ 0 :=
    pow_ne_zero (v i.succ) (leadingCoeff_ne_zero.mp <| by simp [add_comm, leadingCoeff_X_pow_add_C])
  rw [natDegree_mul (by simp [ha]) (mul_ne_zero (by simp) (Finset.prod_ne_zero_iff.mpr
    (fun i _ ↦ h i))), natDegree_mul (by simp) (Finset.prod_ne_zero_iff.mpr (fun i _ ↦ h i)),
    natDegree_prod _ _ (fun i _ ↦ h i), natDegree_finSuccEquiv, degreeOf_C]
  simpa only [natDegree_pow, zero_add, natDegree_X, mul_one, Fin.val_zero, pow_zero, one_mul,
    add_right_inj] using Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ ↦ by
    rw [add_comm (Polynomial.C _), natDegree_X_pow_add_C, mul_comm])

private lemma degreeOf_t_ne_of_ne (hv : v ∈ f.support) (hw : w ∈ f.support) (ne : v ≠ w) :
    (T f <| monomial v <| coeff v f).degreeOf 0 ≠
    (T f <| monomial w <| coeff w f).degreeOf 0 := by
  rw [degreeOf_zero_t _ _ <| mem_support_iff.mp hv, degreeOf_zero_t _ _ <| mem_support_iff.mp hw]
  refine sum_r_mul_ne f v w (fun i ↦ ?_) (fun i ↦ ?_) ne <;>
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt ((monomial_le_degreeOf i ‹_›).trans (degreeOf_le_totalDegree f i)) (by lia)

private lemma leadingCoeff_finSuccEquiv_t :
    (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) ((monomial v) (coeff v f)))).leadingCoeff =
    algebraMap k _ (coeff v f) := by
  rw [monomial_eq, Finsupp.prod_fintype]
  · simp only [map_mul, map_prod, leadingCoeff_mul, leadingCoeff_prod]
    rw [AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom_apply, algHom_C, algebraMap_eq, finSuccEquiv_apply, eval₂Hom_C, coe_comp]
    simp only [AlgEquiv.ofAlgHom_apply, Function.comp_apply, leadingCoeff_C, map_pow,
      leadingCoeff_pow, algebraMap_eq]
    have : ∀ j, ((finSuccEquiv k n) ((T1 f) 1 (X j))).leadingCoeff = 1 := fun j ↦ by
      by_cases h : j = 0
      · simp [h, finSuccEquiv_apply]
      · simp only [aeval_eq_bind₁, bind₁_X_right, if_neg h, one_smul, map_add, map_pow]
        obtain ⟨i, rfl⟩ := Fin.exists_succ_eq.mpr h
        simp [finSuccEquiv_X_succ, finSuccEquiv_X_zero, add_comm]
    simp only [this, one_pow, Finset.prod_const_one, mul_one]
  exact fun i ↦ pow_zero _

/-- Over a domain, the `T`-transform of a non-zero `f` has, in `X_0`, a leading
coefficient equal to `C (coeff v f)` for some `v ∈ f.support` (hence non-zero). The
Mathlib original concludes `IsUnit` using the field hypothesis; here we keep the exact
coefficient so the caller can invert it. -/
private lemma T_leadingcoeff_eq (fne : f ≠ 0) :
    ∃ v ∈ f.support,
      (finSuccEquiv k n (T f f)).leadingCoeff = MvPolynomial.C (coeff v f) := by
  obtain ⟨v, vin, vs⟩ := Finset.exists_max_image f.support
    (fun v ↦ (T f ((monomial v) (coeff v f))).degreeOf 0) (support_nonempty.mpr fne)
  set h := fun w ↦ (MvPolynomial.monomial w) (coeff w f)
  simp only [← natDegree_finSuccEquiv] at vs
  replace vs : ∀ x ∈ f.support \ {v}, (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h x))).degree <
      (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v))).degree := by
    intro x hx
    obtain ⟨h1, h2⟩ := Finset.mem_sdiff.mp hx
    apply degree_lt_degree <| lt_of_le_of_ne (vs x h1) ?_
    simpa only [natDegree_finSuccEquiv]
      using degreeOf_t_ne_of_ne f _ _ h1 vin <| ne_of_not_mem_cons h2
  have coeff : (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v + ∑ x ∈ f.support \ {v}, h x))).leadingCoeff =
      (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v))).leadingCoeff := by
    simp only [map_add, map_sum]
    rw [add_comm]
    apply leadingCoeff_add_of_degree_lt <| (lt_of_le_of_lt <| degree_sum_le _ _) ?_
    have h2 : h v ≠ 0 := by simpa [h] using mem_support_iff.mp vin
    replace h2 : (finSuccEquiv k n ((T f) (h v))) ≠ 0 := fun eq ↦ h2 <|
      by simpa only [map_eq_zero_iff _ (AlgEquiv.injective _)] using eq
    exact (Finset.sup_lt_iff <| Ne.bot_lt (fun x ↦ h2 <| degree_eq_bot.mp x)).mpr vs
  refine ⟨v, vin, ?_⟩
  rw [leadingCoeff_finSuccEquiv_t] at coeff
  nth_rw 2 [← f.support_sum_monomial_coeff]
  rw [Finset.sum_eq_add_sum_diff_singleton_of_mem vin h, coeff, algebraMap_eq]

/-- **L5b.2 — Nagata change of variables: monic in the distinguished variable**
(`lem:gf_nagata_monic_lastVar`, Nitsure §4). For `A` a domain and `0 ≠ F ∈
A[X_0,…,X_m]`, there is a triangular `A`-algebra automorphism `e` and a non-zero
`g ∈ A` such that, after inverting `g`, the image of `e F` in `A_g[X_0,…,X_m]` —
viewed via `finSuccEquiv` as a univariate polynomial in `X_0` — has a *unit* leading
coefficient. (Variable convention: `finSuccEquiv` singles out `X_0`, not `X_m`; the
choice is immaterial up to renaming.) -/
theorem gf_nagata_monic_lastVar
    (A : Type*) [CommRing A] [IsDomain A] (m : ℕ)
    (F : MvPolynomial (Fin (m + 1)) A) (hF : F ≠ 0) :
    ∃ (g : A) (_ : g ≠ 0)
      (e : MvPolynomial (Fin (m + 1)) A ≃ₐ[A] MvPolynomial (Fin (m + 1)) A),
      IsUnit
        (MvPolynomial.finSuccEquiv (Localization.Away g) m
          (MvPolynomial.map (algebraMap A (Localization.Away g)) (e F))).leadingCoeff := by
  obtain ⟨v, vin, hlc⟩ := T_leadingcoeff_eq F hF
  have hg0 : coeff v F ≠ 0 := mem_support_iff.mp vin
  refine ⟨coeff v F, hg0, T F, ?_⟩
  set g := coeff v F with hg
  haveI : Nontrivial (Localization.Away g) := by
    have hle : Submonoid.powers g ≤ nonZeroDivisors A := by
      rw [Submonoid.powers_le]; exact mem_nonZeroDivisors_of_ne_zero hg0
    exact (IsLocalization.injective (Localization.Away g) hle).nontrivial
  have hgunit : IsUnit (algebraMap A (Localization.Away g) g) :=
    IsLocalization.Away.algebraMap_isUnit g
  have hCunit : IsUnit (MvPolynomial.C (algebraMap A (Localization.Away g) g)
      : MvPolynomial (Fin m) (Localization.Away g)) := hgunit.map MvPolynomial.C
  have hne : (MvPolynomial.map (algebraMap A (Localization.Away g)))
      (finSuccEquiv A m (T F F)).leadingCoeff ≠ 0 := by
    rw [hlc, MvPolynomial.map_C]; exact hCunit.ne_zero
  rw [finSuccEquiv_map_comm, leadingCoeff_map_of_leadingCoeff_ne_zero _ hne, hlc,
    MvPolynomial.map_C]
  exact hCunit

end NagataNormalization

/-- Compatibility of `finSuccEquiv` with the constant-variable inclusion
`rename Fin.succ`: the composite `S = R[X_1,…,X_n] → R[X_0,…,X_n] → S[X_0]` is the
coefficient inclusion `Polynomial.C`. Project-local because Mathlib only records the
`optionEquivLeft` variant (`finSuccEquiv_rename_finSuccEquiv`). -/

  `finSuccEquiv_rename_succ`, and the Nagata-machinery transcription `T1`, `T`, `lt_up`,
  `t1_comp_t1_neg`, `sum_r_mul_ne`, `degreeOf_zero_t`, `degreeOf_t_ne_of_ne`,
  `leadingCoeff_finSuccEquiv_t`, `T_leadingcoeff_eq` (all `private`, inside
  `section NagataNormalization`).
- **Declarations blocked (1, partial proof left):** `gf_torsion_reindex` (L5b assembly) — the three
  sub-lemmas now wire in (annihilator → Nagata → elimination engine all typecheck in the body); the
  remaining obligation is localization-module-transport plumbing (precise chain below). NOT a math
  blocker.
- **Pre-existing CLI-only error fixed:** `gf_generic_rank_ses` line ~573 used
  `simp only [Algebra.smul_def, mul_one] at hxy`, which the LSP accepted but `lake env lean` rejected
  (the `•` appears as the un-β-reduced redex `(fun r ↦ r • 1) x`, on which `Algebra.smul_def` does not
  fire under the CLI). Replaced with `apply IsFractionRing.injective P K;
  rw [Algebra.algebraMap_eq_smul_one, Algebra.algebraMap_eq_smul_one]; exact hxy`. **The LSP
  `lean_diagnostic` masks this; always confirm with `lake env lean`.**
- **sorry count:** 5 before → 5 after (same 5 declarations: `exists_localizationAway_finite_mvPolynomial`,
  `gf_torsion_reindex`, `exists_free_localizationAway_polynomial`, `genericFlatnessAlgebraic`,
  `genericFlatness`). Net gain: **3 axiom-clean proven lemmas** (the genuine Mathlib-absent content of
  the §4 dévissage) + 1 drift fix; build GREEN (`lake env lean` exit 0).

## gf_torsion_annihilator (L5b.1) — RESOLVED, axiom-clean
- **Approach:** `Submodule.annihilator_top_inter_nonZeroDivisors htors` gives `F` in
  `⊤.annihilator ∩ nonZeroDivisors P`; `nonZeroDivisors.ne_zero` + `Submodule.annihilator_top`
  rewrite to `F ≠ 0 ∧ F ∈ Module.annihilator P T`.
- **Signature matches blueprint `lem:gf_torsion_annihilator` exactly.** `#print axioms` clean.

## mvPolynomial_quotient_finite_of_monic_lastVar (L5b.3) — RESOLVED, axiom-clean
- **Approach:** rescale `finSuccEquiv R n p` by the inverse of its unit leading coefficient to a monic
  `qt` generating the same ideal (`Ideal.span_singleton_mul_left_unit`); `Polynomial.Monic.finite_quotient`
  gives `Module.Finite S (Polynomial S ⧸ span qt)`; transport along the `S`-algebra iso
  `(P ⧸ span p) ≃ₐ[S] (Polynomial S ⧸ span (finSuccEquiv p))` built from `Ideal.quotientEquiv` +
  `AlgEquiv.ofRingEquiv` (`S`-linearity via `finSuccEquiv_rename_succ`).
- **DEVIATION FROM BLUEPRINT (flag for review/blueprint update):** the blueprint `% LEAN SIGNATURE`
  for `lem:gf_mvPolynomial_quotient_finite_monic` pins the conclusion as an *in-statement*
  `letI : Algebra (MvPolynomial (Fin n) R) (… ⧸ span {p}) := …; Module.Finite (MvPolynomial (Fin n) R) …`.
  That form is **not usable**: elaborating it triggers a `Module (MvPolynomial (Fin n) R) (… ⧸ span p)`
  typeclass search that loops (`isDefEq`/`synthInstance` heartbeat timeout, even bumped to 800k). I
  encoded the *same* content as `RingHom.Finite` of the composite ring map
  `(Ideal.Quotient.mk (span {p})).comp (rename Fin.succ).toRingHom : MvPolynomial (Fin n) R →+* …`,
  which is **definitionally** `Module.Finite … (… ⧸ span p)` with the algebra carried explicitly by the
  ring hom (no search). Mathematically identical; the downstream `gf_torsion_reindex` consumes it via
  `f.toAlgebra`. The blueprint block should be updated to record the `RingHom.Finite` encoding.
- `#print axioms` clean.

## gf_nagata_monic_lastVar (L5b.2) — RESOLVED, axiom-clean
- **Approach:** Mathlib's Noether-normalisation development
  (`Mathlib.RingTheory.NoetherNormalization`) constructs exactly the triangular Nagata transform `T`
  and proves the `X₀`-leading coefficient is a unit — but only over a **field**, as **private** lemmas.
  I transcribed that construction (`T1`, `T`, `degreeOf_zero_t`, `degreeOf_t_ne_of_ne`,
  `leadingCoeff_finSuccEquiv_t`) to a **domain** (the field is used in Mathlib only at the final step to
  conclude the top coefficient is a unit; over a domain it is merely non-zero). My adapted
  `T_leadingcoeff_eq` returns `∃ v ∈ support, leadingCoeff (finSuccEquiv (T F F)) = C (coeff v F)`. Then
  `g := coeff v F ≠ 0`, and after base change to `A_g = Localization.Away g` the leading coefficient
  becomes `C (algebraMap A A_g g)`, a unit (`IsLocalization.Away.algebraMap_isUnit`); the leading
  coefficient transports under `MvPolynomial.map` via `finSuccEquiv_map_comm` +
  `Polynomial.leadingCoeff_map_of_leadingCoeff_ne_zero` (`Nontrivial (Localization.Away g)` from
  `(IsLocalization.injective … hle).nontrivial`).
- **Signature matches blueprint `lem:gf_nagata_monic_lastVar` (binder named `m` not `n`; types identical).**
- **Gotchas for the next agent:** (a) the helper opens must be `open _root_.Polynomial _root_.MvPolynomial
  _root_.Ideal Nat _root_.RingHom List` — bare `open Polynomial` resolves to the **existing
  `AlgebraicGeometry.Polynomial` namespace** and shadows the root API; (b) a literal `φ` binder
  triggered a spurious "unexpected token 'φ'" parse error in one editing context, so I used `phi`.
- `#print axioms` clean.

## gf_torsion_reindex (L5b assembly) — PARTIAL (wiring landed, plumbing sorried)
- **Done in the body (compiles):** `obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_succ_of_ne_zero hd.ne'` (reshape
  `d = m+1`); `gf_torsion_annihilator A (m+1) T htors` → `⟨F, hF0, hFann⟩`;
  `gf_nagata_monic_lastVar A m F hF0` → `⟨g, hg0, e, hunit⟩`;
  `mvPolynomial_quotient_finite_of_monic_lastVar (Localization.Away g) m (map (algebraMap A A_g) (e F)) hunit`
  → `hfin : Module.Finite (MvPolynomial (Fin m) A_g) (… ⧸ span (G))`. **The three sub-lemmas chain
  together with the right types** — this validates their signatures.
- **Remaining obligation (the genuine plumbing, sorried with a precise comment in-code):**
  1. Build a `P_g := MvPolynomial (Fin (m+1)) A_g`-module structure on `T_g := LocalizedModule (powers g) T`.
     Use `MvPolynomial.isLocalization (Submonoid.powers g) A_g : IsLocalization (Submonoid.map C (powers g))
     (MvPolynomial σ A_g)` to identify `P_g` as the localization of `P = MvPolynomial (Fin (m+1)) A` at
     `map C (powers g)`, and the `LocalizedModule`-over-the-localized-ring structure.
  2. **The twist:** let `T_e := Module.compHom T e.symm.toRingHom` (so the `P`-action is restricted along
     `e.symm`). Then `e F ∈ Ann(T_e)` because `e.symm (e F) = F` annihilates `T`. `T_e` is still finite
     over `P` (`e.symm` iso), so `T_e` is a finite `P ⧸ span {e F}`-module
     (`Module.IsTorsionBySet` → `Module (P ⧸ span {e F}) T_e`, finiteness via image of generators). The
     twist preserves the `A`-action (`e` fixes `A`), so `T_e` agrees with `T` as an `A`-module and
     `LocalizedModule (powers g) T_e = T_g` as `A_g`-modules.
  3. Localize `Module.Finite (P ⧸ span {e F}) T_e` at `powers g`: `(P ⧸ span {e F})_g ≅ P_g ⧸ span {G}`
     with `G := map (algebraMap A A_g) (e F)` (localization commutes with quotient — `Ideal.quotientEquiv`
     of `IsLocalization`, or `Localization`/`IsLocalization.quotient` API), and `T_g` finite over it.
  4. `Module.Finite.trans (P_g ⧸ span {G}) T_g` with `hfin` (which is exactly
     `Module.Finite (MvPolynomial (Fin m) A_g) (P_g ⧸ span {G})`) gives
     `Module.Finite (MvPolynomial (Fin m) A_g) T_g`.
  5. Witnesses: `g`, `hg0`, `m' := m`, `Nat.lt_succ_self m`; the `Module A_g T_g` slot is the canonical
     `inferInstance`; the `MvPolynomial (Fin m) A_g`-module + the `IsScalarTower A_g (MvPolynomial (Fin m)
     A_g) T_g` come from the step-4 structure (the `rename Fin.succ` tower is standard).
- **Why not finished this iter:** steps 1–3 each require a non-trivial localization/module-transport
  identification (double-localization of `T`, `IsTorsionBySet` quotient action, localization-commutes-
  with-quotient), each with its own instance/diamond management. It is mechanical but large (~120–180
